label: Rainbow text
summary: Per-character rainbow text via a banded gradient, for headlines only.
era: Rainbow headlines built one <font color> tag per letter, a whole evening in Notepad, now a single class.

classes.name: rs-rainbow
classes.role: banded per-character rainbow via background-clip; headlines only

a11y: It stays plain, selectable text under the paint. Reserve it for 24px-and-up headlines, where the banded colors clear large-text contrast against the theme background.
